topic: I went hiking alone and found a campsite that had been waiting for me
title: I Went Hiking Alone and Found a Campsite That Had Been Waiting for Me | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I went hiking alone in the Adirondacks. I found a campsite set up with my name on it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a green canvas tent in a forest clearing at dusk, a small wooden sign staked into the ground in front of the tent reading a name in carved letters, the surrounding trees dark, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three day solo trip. North country. Off-trail.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dense pine forest in late afternoon light, a faint deer trail through the underbrush, no human path visible, dappled sunlight on the forest floor, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Day two I got turned around following a creek.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small forest creek running through dense undergrowth, late afternoon golden light through the canopy, the creek disappearing into shadows in the distance, no human presence, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I came over a ridge and saw a clearing.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot from a forested ridge looking down into a small clearing in the trees, the clearing visible through gaps in the foliage, late afternoon light reaching the ground, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tent already pitched. Fire ring stones still warm.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a green canvas tent in a small forest clearing, a stone fire ring nearby with the embers still glowing faintly, no person visible, dusk light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Sleeping bag laid out. My size.
scenes.image_prompt: interior view through the open flap of a tent showing a sleeping bag rolled out on the floor, a backpack at the head end, a flashlight resting on top of the bag, dim tent ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Cooler with food. Brand I always buy.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an opened plastic camping cooler on the ground beside a tent, food visible inside including specific items, a few melting ice cubes, late afternoon light filtering through trees, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A wooden sign at the entrance had my full name carved into it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand-carved wooden sign staked into the ground at the edge of a forest clearing, a name visible in deep carved letters, slightly weathered wood, dim dusk light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I left immediately. Walked back the way I came.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot from behind of a hiker walking away through a dense forest at twilight, the figure receding into the trees, a backpack visible, no path under their feet, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Got to my car at sunset. Drove home.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dirt forest service road at sunset, a single dusty pickup truck parked at the trailhead, no other vehicles, the forest casting long shadows across the road, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had told nobody where I was going.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a paper hiking map spread across a kitchen table at home, a route highlighted in pencil, no notations or names written on it, ambient evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A photograph of that campsite arrived in my mailbox last week.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single Polaroid photograph lying on a hardwood floor inside a residential entryway, the image showing the same forest clearing with the tent and carved sign, an empty white envelope beside it, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
